plan_review_notes: Closed-state canonicalization fits the existing normalization contract and regression coverage now includes stale closed record reads.

plan_review_history.notes: Aligned the task docs with the implemented projection-path change: state.py now centralizes docs-derived normalization, load/list/save all share that path, MCP record resources inherit the synced task state automatically, and focused plus broader regression suites passed.
Plan matches the implemented scope: shared docs-derived projection normalization in state.py, consistent load/list/save behavior, MCP record projection coverage, and broad regression confirmation.
Extended the normalization scope to canonicalize terminal closed-state projection so stale records cannot keep workflow_phase=verified after close.
Closed-state canonicalization fits the existing normalization contract and regression coverage now includes stale closed record reads.

spec_review_notes: Spec frozen with the additional guarantee that terminal closed tasks are projected back as workflow_phase=closed by the shared normalization path.

normal_cases.name: Loading and listing a task after editing `PLAN.md` surfaces the same doc-derived `test_strategy` and `design` state.
MCP `task://.../record` reads return the normalized projection instead of raw stale defaults.

edge_cases.name: Save-time normalization stays safe for tasks whose docs are still incomplete or partially templated.
Existing planning, MCP, evolution, and golden-template tests continue to pass after centralizing normalization.
Stale closed tasks are read back as `workflow_phase=closed` instead of preserving an outdated in-memory phase.

exception_cases.name: Missing or partial plan sections do not crash task load/list projections.

verification_methods.target: Loading and listing a task after editing PLAN.md surfaces the same doc-derived test_strategy and design state
MCP task://.../record reads return the normalized projection instead of raw stale defaults
Save-time normalization stays safe for tasks whose docs are still incomplete or partially templated
Existing planning, MCP, evolution, and golden-template tests continue to pass after centralizing normalization
verification_methods.method: env PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 .venv/bin/python -m unittest tests.test_sisyphus tests.test_mcp_server tests.test_mcp_core tests.test_mcp_adapter tests.test_evolution tests.test_golden

verification_methods.target: Stale closed tasks are read back as workflow_phase=closed instead of preserving an outdated in-memory phase
